title: Delicious Tunisian Wrap
description: A flavorful and refreshing snack featuring the unique taste of Tunisian herbs. Simply wrap and serve.
instructions: Preheat the grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the potato slices with a little water and season with Tunisian herbs.
Grill the potato slices for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender and lightly charred.
In a small bowl, mix together the toasted starch and a pinch of salt.
Warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the starch mixture on the wrap, followed by the grilled potato slices.
